languages.text: "Ты хотел дискутировать. Давай начнем с простого — в чем смысл жизни?"
"You wished to debate. Let's begin with something simple — what is the meaning of life?"
languages.original_text: "Ты хотел дискутировать. Давай начнем с простого — в чем смысл жизни?"

traits.locale_text: "You wished to debate. Let's begin with something simple — what is the meaning of life?"
"You wished to debate. Let's begin with something simple — what is the meaning of life?"
"You wished to debate. Let's begin with something simple — what is the meaning of life?"

languages.text: «Quería debatir. Empecemos por algo sencillo: ¿cuál es el sentido de la vida?».
languages.original_text: "You wished to debate. Let's begin with something simple — what is the meaning of life?"

traits.locale_text: «Quería debatir. Empecemos por algo sencillo: ¿cuál es el sentido de la vida?».

languages.text: “你不是想辩论吗？那我们先从简单的开始：生命的意义是什么？”
languages.original_text: "You wished to debate. Let's begin with something simple — what is the meaning of life?"

traits.locale_text: “你不是想辩论吗？那我们先从简单的开始：生命的意义是什么？”

languages.text: « Vous souhaitiez débattre. Commençons par un sujet des plus simples : quel est le sens de la vie ? »
languages.original_text: "You wished to debate. Let's begin with something simple — what is the meaning of life?"

traits.locale_text: « Vous souhaitiez débattre. Commençons par un sujet des plus simples : quel est le sens de la vie ? »

languages.text: "Ihr wolltet debattieren. Fangen wir mit etwas Einfachem am an was ist der Sinn des Lebens?
languages.original_text: "You wished to debate. Let's begin with something simple — what is the meaning of life?"

traits.locale_text: "Ihr wolltet debattieren. Fangen wir mit etwas Einfachem am an was ist der Sinn des Lebens?

languages.text: 「あなたは討論を望んだ。まずは簡単なことから始めよう-人生の意味とは何か？」
languages.original_text: "You wished to debate. Let's begin with something simple — what is the meaning of life?"

traits.locale_text: 「あなたは討論を望んだ。まずは簡単なことから始めよう-人生の意味とは何か？」

languages.text: "Tartışmak istedin. Basit bir şeyle başlayalım. Hayatın anlamı nedir?"
languages.original_text: "You wished to debate. Let's begin with something simple — what is the meaning of life?"

traits.locale_text: "Tartışmak istedin. Basit bir şeyle başlayalım. Hayatın anlamı nedir?"
